response.justification: Wei Chen has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, with notable strengths in distributed systems, DevOps, and leadership via mentoring. However, his primary expertise leans toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and D, with limited C++ experience (only 1 year at National Instruments) and no explicit cloud architecture or large-scale infrastructure experience. His lack of direct C++ depth and cloud leadership may hinder full alignment with the role's core requirements.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentoring experience, demonstrated through workshops, talks, and team contributions.
Extensive experience with distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance architectures.
Proven ability to manage and deliver complex technical projects across diverse domains.
concerns: Limited C++ experience (only ~1 year) and no recent work in the language, falling short of the 8-year requirement.
No explicit production-level cloud architecture experience or direct DevOps/cloud compute platform leadership.
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and D, with minimal exposure to cloud technologies like AWS CDK or Kubernetes.
